privileged_info_summary: Task requires InVesalius 3 (real open-source medical imaging software) to process a public DICOM dataset (CT Cranium series 0051 from official InVesalius v3.0 GitHub releases). All output paths, file formats (.inv3 as gzipped tar with main.plist and measurements.plist, PNG with correct magic bytes 0x89504E47), and thresholds (3+ measurements each ≥30 mm, 10 KB minimum PNG size) are consistently documented across setup scripts, README, task.json, and verifier code. The .inv3 format is the authentic InVesalius project format containing masks, surfaces, and measurement data.
